+# Execution Report
+
+DISPATCH_ID: ISSUE-166
+AUTHOR: Executor / Claude
+TIMESTAMP: 2026-05-25_08-37-48+0300
+RELATED_FILES:
+- crates/components-spatial/Cargo.toml — added `rge-kernel-ecs` workspace dep under `[dependencies]`
+- crates/components-spatial/src/transform.rs — added `impl rge_kernel_ecs::Component for Transform {}`
+- crates/components-spatial/tests/ecs_attach.rs — new integration tests round-tripping `Transform` through `World`
+- crates/components-render/Cargo.toml — added `rge-kernel-ecs` workspace dep under `[dependencies]`
+- crates/components-render/src/camera.rs — added `impl rge_kernel_ecs::Component for Camera {}`
+- crates/components-render/src/light.rs — added `impl rge_kernel_ecs::Component for Light {}`
+- crates/components-render/tests/ecs_attach.rs — new integration tests round-tripping `Camera` and `Light` through `World`
+- crates/components-visibility/Cargo.toml — added `rge-kernel-ecs` workspace dep under `[dependencies]`
+- crates/components-visibility/src/visibility.rs — added `impl rge_kernel_ecs::Component for Visibility {}`
+- crates/components-visibility/tests/ecs_attach.rs — new integration tests round-tripping `Visibility` through `World`
+- Cargo.lock — three mechanical dependency-edge additions (`rge-kernel-ecs` listed under each of the three component packages); no version bumps, checksum changes, source changes, or new packages
+STATUS: AWAITING_REVIEW
+
+## Task Packet Reference
+
+`ai_handoffs/ISSUE-166_TASK_2026-05-25_08-25-22+0300.md`
+
+## Pre-Execution Review Consumed
+
+No pre-execution review issued for this dispatch.
+
+## What I Changed
+
+### Source
+
+- `crates/components-spatial/src/transform.rs`: appended `impl rge_kernel_ecs::Component for Transform {}` directly after the `Default` impl, before the `#[cfg(test)]` block.
+- `crates/components-render/src/camera.rs`: appended `impl rge_kernel_ecs::Component for Camera {}` after the `Default` impl, before the `#[cfg(test)]` block.
+- `crates/components-render/src/light.rs`: appended `impl rge_kernel_ecs::Component for Light {}` after the `Default` impl, before the `#[cfg(test)]` block.
+- `crates/components-visibility/src/visibility.rs`: appended `impl rge_kernel_ecs::Component for Visibility {}` after the `Visibility` enum, before the `#[cfg(test)]` block.
+- `crates/components-spatial/Cargo.toml`, `crates/components-render/Cargo.toml`, `crates/components-visibility/Cargo.toml`: each added `rge-kernel-ecs = { workspace = true }` under `[dependencies]` (not `[dev-dependencies]`), preserving existing alphabetical ordering of dep entries.
+
+No other production source was touched. No reflection / registry / macro / loader / runtime-indirection work was added; the implementation is the four direct marker `impl`s plus the required manifest entries.
+
+### Tests
+
+- `crates/components-spatial/tests/ecs_attach.rs::transform_insert_and_retrieve`: spawns a fresh entity in a new `World`, inserts `Transform::from_translation([1.0, 2.0, 3.0])`, retrieves via `world.entity(id).unwrap().get::<Transform>()`, and asserts value equality.
+- `crates/components-spatial/tests/ecs_attach.rs::transform_spawn_with_query`: spawns through `World::spawn_with(Transform::IDENTITY)` and confirms retrieval via `entity().get::<Transform>()` returns `Transform::IDENTITY`.
+- `crates/components-render/tests/ecs_attach.rs::camera_insert_and_retrieve`: inserts a non-default `Camera` (orthographic projection, `priority = 7`) into a fresh `World`, retrieves, asserts equality.
+- `crates/components-render/tests/ecs_attach.rs::light_insert_and_retrieve`: inserts a non-default `Light` (point variant with `lumens = 250.0`, `range_m = 12.5`, `affects_indirect = false`), retrieves, asserts equality.
+- `crates/components-visibility/tests/ecs_attach.rs::visibility_insert_and_retrieve`: inserts `Visibility::Hidden`, retrieves, asserts equality.
+- `crates/components-visibility/tests/ecs_attach.rs::visibility_spawn_with_default`: spawns through `World::spawn_with(Visibility::default())` and confirms retrieval returns `Visibility::Inherited`.
+
+All pre-existing serde/RON tests are left untouched and continue to pass.
+
+### Docs
+
+- None. No docs/ADR/schema/script/golden-project/architecture-lint files were added or modified (per `MUST NOT add new files`).
+
+## Per-File Summary
+
+(Skipped — the bullet lists above are complete; each edit is at most three lines.)
+
+## Verification Results
+
+- `cargo test -p rge-components-spatial -p rge-components-render -p rge-components-visibility` → exit 0.
+  - `rge-components-spatial` lib: 11 passed / 0 failed / 0 ignored.
+  - `rge-components-spatial` integration `ecs_attach`: 2 passed / 0 failed / 0 ignored.
+  - `rge-components-render` lib: 16 passed / 0 failed / 0 ignored.
+  - `rge-components-render` integration `ecs_attach`: 2 passed / 0 failed / 0 ignored.
+  - `rge-components-visibility` lib: 9 passed / 0 failed / 0 ignored.
+  - `rge-components-visibility` integration `ecs_attach`: 2 passed / 0 failed / 0 ignored.
+  - Doc-tests (all three crates): 0 / 0 / 0.
+- `.\.ai\dispatch.verify.ps1` → exit 0; final line `VERIFY OK: all 7 verification step(s) passed.` Steps:
+  - `cargo +nightly fmt --all -- --check` → ok.
+  - `cargo run -q -p rge-tool-architecture-lints -- all` → ok.
+  - `cargo test -p rge-tool-architecture-lints --all-targets` → ok.
+  - `cargo deny check` → ok.
+  - `cargo test --workspace --all-targets --no-fail-fast -j 1` → ok.
+  - `cargo test --workspace --doc --no-fail-fast -j 1` → ok.
+  - `cargo bench -p rge-script-bench --no-run` → ok.
+  Full log captured at `A:\RCAD\RGE\.ai\dispatch.verify.ISSUE-166.log` (gitignored).
+- Diff inspection (`git status --short` + `git diff --stat`):
+  - 8 tracked files modified: `Cargo.lock` and the seven `MAY edit` source/manifest files listed under RELATED_FILES.
+  - 3 new tracked directories: `crates/components-spatial/tests/`, `crates/components-render/tests/`, `crates/components-visibility/tests/`, each containing exactly one new file `ecs_attach.rs`.
+  - No protected path modified, no `kernel/**` change, no new workspace member, no new crate (`rge-scene-loader` was not created).
+- `Cargo.lock` inspection (`git diff Cargo.lock`): exactly three hunks, one per component package, each adding `"rge-kernel-ecs"` to that package's `dependencies` array. Zero version bumps, zero checksum changes, zero source changes, zero new packages.
+
+## Deviations from Task Packet
+
+None — execution stayed strictly within the Task Packet scope. Four `Component` impls, three manifest entries, three new test files, and the three permitted `Cargo.lock` dependency-edge additions.
+
+## Open Questions for Reviewer
+
+- First draft of the integration tests fetched `world.entity(id).unwrap().get::<T>()` in a single chained expression. The `EntityRef` returned by `World::entity` is a temporary; chaining `.get::<T>()` through it triggers `error[E0716]: temporary value dropped while borrowed`. Fixed by binding `let entity_ref = world.entity(id).expect(...)` first, then calling `.get::<T>()` on the binding — matches the in-tree pattern used by `kernel/ecs/src/world.rs` tests (e.g. `assert_eq!(w.entity(id).unwrap().get::<Pos>(), Some(&Pos { x: 1.0 }));` works only because the temporary survives until the end of the `assert_eq!` macro expression). Reviewer: please confirm the let-binding style is acceptable.
+- No new reflection / registry / macro / loader work was added. Issue #41 (the `rge-scene-loader` follow-up) is left untouched per the Task Packet's explicit non-goal.
+
+## Worktree State
+
+- Tracked files modified (uncommitted): `Cargo.lock`, `crates/components-render/Cargo.toml`, `crates/components-render/src/camera.rs`, `crates/components-render/src/light.rs`, `crates/components-spatial/Cargo.toml`, `crates/components-spatial/src/transform.rs`, `crates/components-visibility/Cargo.toml`, `crates/components-visibility/src/visibility.rs`.
+- Untracked items: `ai_handoffs/ISSUE-166_TASK_2026-05-25_08-25-22+0300.md`, `ai_handoffs/ISSUE-166_TASK_2026-05-25_08-25-22+0300.meta.json`, `ai_handoffs/ISSUE-166_EXEC_2026-05-25_08-37-48+0300.md` (this packet), `crates/components-render/tests/ecs_attach.rs`, `crates/components-spatial/tests/ecs_attach.rs`, `crates/components-visibility/tests/ecs_attach.rs`.
+- Branch: `ai-dispatch/ISSUE-166`.
+- Last commit: `af2c5d7` chore(dispatch): close #165 + queue task #40 component impl.
+- No commit or push performed (per protocol rules).
+

+
+DISPATCH_ID: ISSUE-166
+AUTHOR: Planner / OpenAI Codex
+TIMESTAMP: 2026-05-25_08-25-22+0300
+RELATED_FILES:
+- Cargo.lock
+- crates/components-spatial/Cargo.toml
+- crates/components-spatial/src/lib.rs
+- crates/components-spatial/src/transform.rs
+- crates/components-render/Cargo.toml
+- crates/components-render/src/lib.rs

+- crates/components-visibility/Cargo.toml

+STATUS: OPEN
+
+## Goal
+
+Make the four simple-scene component types from GitHub issue #166 directly attachable to the existing ECS `World`. This dispatch implements the issue #165 decision narrowly: the owning component crates provide direct `rge_kernel_ecs::Component` impls for `Transform`, `Camera`, `Light`, and `Visibility`, with focused insertion/retrieval tests and no reflection, registry, loader-crate, or runtime indirection work.
+
+## Scope
+
+### MAY edit
+
+- `crates/components-spatial/Cargo.toml`
+- `crates/components-spatial/src/lib.rs`
+- `crates/components-spatial/src/transform.rs`
+- `crates/components-spatial/tests/**/*.rs`
+- `crates/components-render/Cargo.toml`
+- `crates/components-render/src/lib.rs`
+- `crates/components-render/src/camera.rs`
+- `crates/components-render/src/light.rs`
+- `crates/components-render/tests/**/*.rs`
